---
title: "Query Garden Revealjs Example"
author: "Nakul R. Padalkar"
format: revealjs
filters:
  - ../_extensions/query-garden/query-garden.lua
query-garden:
  databases:
    - name: hr
      sql-file-path: "hr.sql"
---

## Output Below

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| dialect: postgresql
select * from regions;
```

## Output In Columns

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| dialect: mysql
#| output-location: column
select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;
```

## Output As Fragment

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| output-location: fragment
select country_id, country_name, region_id
from countries
limit 5;
```

## Output After Code

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| output-location: slide
select department_id, department_name, location_id
from departments
limit 5;
```
